examples: TrES-2b has no ammonia clouds to reflect light because it is extremely hot.
However, TrES-2b is not entirely black. Its extreme heat means it gives off a faint red glow.
TrES-2b is so black that it’s darker than coal, or any other planet or moon that we’ve yet discovered.
